title: rubus × gradatus
intro: Rubus × gradatus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between Rubus allegheniensis and Rubus argutus, resulting in a shrub with edible and medicinal properties. The plant contains salicylic acid, which is responsible for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × gradatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Rubus × gradatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
